Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney for failure to appear and for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal. The return date is April 22, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Svahlin.
